pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in task description and queried via export_result.sh.
Explicitly defined as DEF WAREHOUSE_AMR Robot in setup_task.sh.
Task description requests changing basicTimeStep from 64 to 8.
Task description explicitly requests setting inertial unit noise to 0.0005.
Task description explicitly requests setting accelerometer lookupTable from -100 to 100.
Task description explicitly requests setting gyro lookupTable from -34.9 to 34.9.
Explicitly stated in the first sentence of the task description.
Contextual domain matches the task description (Warehouse AMR navigation).

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for webots_env configure_imu_navigation task by confirming that the prerequisite AMR robot and environment are synthetically generated via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected target timestep (8), inertial noise (0.0005), accel range (100), gyro range (34.9), and output path explicitly match the task description instructions. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
